CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE tokens (token_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, expiration TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password) VALUES (1, 'testuser', 'password1');
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password) VALUES (2, 'admin', 'password2');
INSERT INTO tokens (token_id, user_id, token, expiration) VALUES (1, 1, 'token123', NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour');
INSERT INTO tokens (token_id, user_id, token, expiration) VALUES (2, 2, 'token456', NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour');
SELECT token FROM tokens WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'testuser') AND expiration > NOW();
SELECT t.token FROM tokens t JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE u.username = 'admin' AND t.expiration > NOW();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tokens WHERE expiration < NOW();
DELETE FROM tokens WHERE expiration < NOW();
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tokens WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'testuser') AND token = 'token123');
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) FROM tokens GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT u.username, t.token FROM users u LEFT JOIN tokens t ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.token IS NULL;
UPDATE users SET password = 'newpassword' WHERE username = 'testuser';
SELECT token FROM tokens WHERE token_id = (SELECT MAX(token_id) FROM tokens) AND expiration > NOW();
